<tool_call>

<parameter=code>
# Current: top charcoal cols 22-63, bottom charcoal cols 14-17
# Try moving bottom charcoal to rightmost (cols 22-25) with 2 clicks of (46, 2)

    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c':
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  Click {i+1}: charcoal {n['pixels']}px, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        print("  LEVEL COMPLETED!")
        break
    if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        print("  GAME OVER!")
